tool.name: Veo Video Generation
tool.description: Generate high-fidelity videos from text prompts using the Veo model.

prompt.description: Descriptive prompt for the video to generate

negative_prompt.description: What to exclude from the video

duration_seconds.description: Duration of the video in seconds

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video

ai.systemPromptSection:
### Veo Video Generation
Generate videos based on text prompts.

**Capabilities:**
- Text-to-Video generation
- Cinematic quality

**Usage:**
Call this tool with a detailed prompt describing the desired scene, action, and style.
